@Advokaiser That is a magnificent question Advokaiser! 67 is a popular internet meme that derives from Skrilla's song "67" which then got popularized when an ice-cream-scoop-haircut-ahh kid said "SIX SEVENNNN" at a football game because of the score. Then because of the kid being corny everyone now says 67 because its funny

Oh since you asked, 41 derives from an Instagram rapper that made his song yapping about how he's 41 years old but he has 41 gold. so he's the 41 year old rapper, and it is now solid competition with 67
@daholymackerel Hahaha, thanks for the explanation, cultured fella!
